attributes.title: [PostgreSQL OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of PostgreSQL health and golden signals - connection capacity, transaction throughput, errors, buffer cache efficiency, and capacity.

"id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [PostgreSQL OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides an overview of PostgreSQL health and golden signals:
- Connection capacity and utilization
- Transaction throughput (commits vs rollbacks)
- Error rates (deadlocks, rollbacks)
- Buffer cache hit ratio
- Checkpoint and background writer health
- Database size and capacity
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "531b5df3-5822-80ca-87c7-18a755781b47", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 2, "w": 8, "h": 4, "i": "531b5df3-5822-80ca-87c7-18a755781b47"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Active Connections", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "67f279a3-9f31-d488-0a73-4371a58ee20a", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "333b03ee-0f81-633a-41c3-110ff83a21fe", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*

"isMetric": true}], "layerId": "17000239-ac58-2e7f-15ba-77ce28d2ec59", "layerType": "data"}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
| STATS connections = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(postgresql.backends)), commits = SUM(RATE(postgresql.commits)), rollbacks = SUM(RATE(postgresql.rollbacks)), deadlocks = SUM(INCREASE(postgresql.deadlocks)), blks_hit = SUM(RATE(postgresql.blks_hit)), blks_read = SUM(RATE(postgresql.blks_read)), temp_files = SUM(INCREASE(postgresql.temp_files)), db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(postgresql.db_size)) BY resource.attributes.postgresql.database.name
| EVAL rollback_pct = CASE(commits + rollbacks > 0, rollbacks / (commits + rollbacks) * 100.0, 0.0), hit_ratio = CASE(blks_hit + blks_read > 0, blks_hit / (blks_hit + blks_read), 0.0)
| KEEP resource.attributes.postgresql.database.name, connections, commits, rollback_pct, deadlocks, hit_ratio, temp_files, db_size
| SORT connections DESC
"}, "filters": [], "datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"17000239-ac58-2e7f-15ba-77ce28d2ec59": {"query": {"esql": "TS metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*

| EVAL rollback_pct = CASE(commits + rollbacks > 0, rollbacks / (commits + rollbacks) * 100.0, 0.0), hit_ratio = CASE(blks_hit + blks_read > 0, blks_hit / (blks_hit + blks_read), 0.0)
| KEEP resource.attributes.postgresql.database.name, connections, commits, rollback_pct, deadlocks, hit_ratio, temp_files, db_size
| SORT connections DESC
